steps.title: Set up the outer and inner rectangles
steps.content: The pool is 21 ft by 11 ft, with area $21 \times 11 = 231$ ft². A concrete path of width $x$ extends on all four sides, so the outer rectangle has dimensions $(21 + 2x)$ ft by $(11 + 2x)$ ft. The path area is the difference: $$(21 + 2x)(11 + 2x) - 231 = 144$$

steps.title: Backsolve with the multiple choice answers
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (4): Outer area is $(21 + 8)(11 + 8) = 29 \times 19 = 551$ ft².

Path area is $551 - 231 = 320$ ft² — not 144, so B fails.
Backsolving — testing choice A (2): Outer area is $(21 + 4)(11 + 4) = 25 \times 15 = 375$ ft².

Path area is $375 - 231 = 144$ ft² ✓. That matches choice A — A is correct.
